case_title: MICHAEL J. MAPP VS. FRANCIS H. CHUNG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MAPP, MICHAEL J. AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, FRANCIS H. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-23-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED NOV-10-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, FRANCIS H.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY MAPP, MICHAEL J. CHUNG, FRANCIS H.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-23-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-23-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-23-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAPP, MICHAEL J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHUNG, FRANCIS H. PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE BREACH OF CONTRACT OR ANY OTHER THEORY OF LIABILITY TO LEAD TO THE RECOVERY HE SEEKS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
